Title: NAICOM risk-based capital reforms
Description: Pending recapitalisation and risk-based supervision changes could require additional capital buffers and alter product pricing.
Additional Notes: Raised in NAICOM industry consultation, Q2 2026

Title: Climate disclosure mandate alignment
Description: Regulators increasingly expect IFRS S2-aligned climate risk disclosures in annual filings.
Additional Notes: Peer insurers (AXA Mansard, Leadway) have begun voluntary IFRS S2 reporting

Title: Rising claims from flood-prone regions
Description: Increased frequency of flooding in Lagos and the Niger Delta is driving higher property and motor claims.
Additional Notes: Flagged by NIA (Nigerian Insurers Association) 2025 climate risk bulletin

Title: Growth in renewable energy insurance demand
Description: Peers are launching insurance products for solar and renewable energy assets as adoption grows in the market.
Additional Notes: Opportunity to differentiate via a new product line

Title: Anti-money laundering enforcement tightening
Description: Regulatory scrutiny on KYC and AML compliance across the insurance sector is increasing, with higher penalties for lapses.

Title: Talent competition for actuarial and ESG skills
Description: Peer insurers are competing aggressively for scarce actuarial and sustainability talent, raising retention risk.

Title: Reinsurance capacity tightening for catastrophe risk
Description: Global reinsurers are reducing capacity or raising rates for catastrophe-exposed African markets.
Additional Notes: Observed at the 2025 Africa Reinsurance renewal season
